title: [Monastery, Meditation Room]
description: The smell of pungent incense dominates this room.  A globe hangs from the ceiling casting dim light over the room.  A small, hand-woven mat lies on the floor in front of a small shrine with two unlit candles atop it.  Several other mats lie rolled up next to a small wicker basket.  Standing in the corner is a simple wooden box.

wayto.6633: ;e move 'go door'; if checkpaths.include?('n'); move 'north'; move 'northeast'; move 'west'; end
wayto.6636: ;e move 'go door'; if checkpaths.include?('e'); move 'east'; move 'southeast'; move 'south'; end
